nasb.text: And He said to them, “Go!” And they came out and went into the swine, and the whole herd rushed down the steep bank into the sea and perished in the waters.

esv.text: And he said to them, “Go.” So they came out and went into the pigs, and behold, the whole herd rushed down the steep bank into the sea and drowned in the waters.

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“出去吧！”他們就出來，進了豬群。那一群豬忽然闖下山崖，掉在海裡淹死了。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“去吧！” 于是，鬼从那二人身上出来，进入猪群，整群猪就一路奔下陡坡，冲进湖里淹死了。

csbs.text: 耶稣对它们说：“去吧！”它们就出来，进入猪里面去了。忽然，那整群猪从山崖冲到湖里，在水里淹死了。
